data.description: Refactor the shipped Knots SDLC Loom profiles so profile structure, phase flow, and prompts reflect real delivery modes. In no-PR workflows, remove any suggestion that review relies on a PR-shaped artifact. In review/shipment phases, make the target explicit and correct for that profile: branch review, PR review, post-merge main review, or already-live code. Preserve human-gated variants and keep all profile behavior explicit and testable.
